reviews.author: Shivani K
reviews.review_body: Worst admission experience. All old grannies sitting in during the admission process. Don’t go to this school

reviews.author: Varshikey
reviews.review_body:
My experience at Amity International School was deeply disappointing. The infrastructure left much to be desired, with facilities that were not only outdated but also inadequately maintained. Classrooms were often cramped and lacked the essential resources needed for a conducive learning environment.

What was most troubling, however, was the behavior of some of the teachers. Rather than fostering a supportive atmosphere, there were instances where their actions felt more like harassment than guidance. This created an environment of stress and discomfort for the students, which is simply unacceptable.

The situation among the students was also concerning. Misbehavior was widespread, and it seemed as though the administration either didn’t notice or didn’t care enough to intervene effectively.

In conclusion, my experience at Amity International School was overwhelmingly negative. The combination of subpar infrastructure, inappropriate conduct from some teachers, and disruptive student behavior made it a place I cannot recommend. Significant changes are needed to create a safe and supportive environment for learning.

reviews.author: ANANYA BHARDWAJ
reviews.review_body:
very hypocrital school! Even the students misbehaved
they were smoking in the bathroom
the washroom were terrible
my ward have refused to go to school after such a terrible experience
the school feel like it has not been renovated since 1669.
you first figure out that is it an international school or global school . 📉📉📉📉💔💔💔💔

reviews.author: Priya Bhandari
reviews.review_body:
My experience with amity for admission process had been worse from the time we entered the premise, during interactions and receiving communication from them.

The staff and principal there is full of attitude and don’t treat the parents well. It started from our experience interacting at the reception itself. There  is very poor management   after multiple follow ups we received an invite for virtual interaction where they interview the child and parents. The interaction with child only focused on what they are looking for and not what child is good at or her interest. They give us hope for one month we will give admission don't worry. I was waiting till 6 April.  At last they said not clear. If u r not giving admission to child. You should say no to parents on time. At least time toh na khrab hota. Or kisi school me toh try krte. Amity me ho jayga admission krke teen school k call Missed kr diya. Kyuki amity ne bola tha ki ho jayga agr inko mna krna tha within two days me mna kr dete.

reviews.author: Ruchika Chauhan
reviews.review_body:
Don't ruin your ward future. It just fame of name. Govt school is more better than this. Teacher is always on bad mood.
they have washrooms which seem like govt. toilets and students have scribbled awful things on the doors of the washroom like who are their crush, boyfriend’s etc……and cheating is like a game for them… Students hide chits in the washrooms etc. There are literally rats and lizards in the classroom and talk about the chairs and desks….they are broken sometimes even thorns in the wood of the chair which can hurt you very badly…..now, if this is the situation of the classrooms and washrooms

reviews.author: SAURABH KAIN
reviews.review_body: The book shop is very poor interms of working and responding to parents genuine concerns. No lunch hours timings, no response on calls. Very very poor experience

reviews.author: Rishi Seth
reviews.review_body: It is one of the best places to send your kids to. The education structure teachers and management is just great.

reviews.review_body: I HAVE FILLED ADMISSION FORM. I NOW WANT TO ENQUIRE ABOUT THE SCHOOL .BUT NEITHER ANY EMAIL CORRESPONDENCE HAS BEEN STARTED BY THE SCHOOL NOR ANY PICKING THE CALL. NOT SURE HOW TO PROCEED.

reviews.review_body: Such a good school it is 💯just perfect school must send your child there.
